query:
ALTER TABLE project_items
  ADD COLUMN supplier_offer_url TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN supplier_offer_key VARCHAR(512) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN supplier_offer_name VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN supplier_id INT NULL;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS complaints (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  status ENUM('open','in_progress','resolved','closed') DEFAULT 'open' NOT NULL,
  priority ENUM('low','normal','high','critical') DEFAULT 'normal' NOT NULL,
  reported_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  resolution TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS complaint_attachments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  complaint_id INT NOT NULL,
  file_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_key VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  filename VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  file_type VARCHAR(64),
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
